title: lantana micrantha var. armata
intro: Lantana micrantha var. armata, a shrub-like plant native to tropical America, belongs to the Verbenaceae family and is known for its fragrant flowers and leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lantana micrantha var. armata include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal preparations such as ointments and tinctures.
